question: இந்தியாவில் குழந்தைகள் நல மையங்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில், முதல் 5 மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களையும் அவற்றின் மையங்களின் எண்ணிக்கையையும் இறங்கு வரிசையில் பட்டியலிடவும்.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T5 ON T4.COUNTRY_ID = T5.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T5.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.district_name,
    SUM(fmcnc.number_of_child_welfare_centres) AS total_child_welfare_centers
FROM 
    fact_maternity_child_care fmcnc
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district sdd ON fmcnc.sub_district_id = sdd.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_district d ON sdd.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state st ON d.state_id = st.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_country co ON st.country_id = co.country_id
WHERE 
    co.country_name = 'India'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id, d.district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_child_welfare_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.district_name,
    SUM(fmcnc.number_of_child_welfare_centres) AS total_child_welfare_centers
FROM 
    fact_maternity_child_care fmcnc
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district sdd ON fmcnc.sub_district_id = sdd.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_district d ON sdd.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state st ON d.state_id = st.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_country co ON st.country_id = co.country_id
WHERE 
    co.country_name = 'India'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id, d.district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_child_welfare_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ஆந்திரப் பிரதேச மாநிலத்தைப் பொறுத்தவரை, ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்தின் பெயரையும், அங்குள்ள மகப்பேறு மற்றும் குழந்தை நல மையங்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையையும் பட்டியலிடவும். இந்த எண்ணிக்கையை இறங்கு வரிசையில் வரிசைப்படுத்தி, முதல் 5 மாவட்டங்களை மட்டும் காட்டவும்.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmc.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) AS total_centers
FROM 
    DIM_STATE s
JOIN 
    DIM_DISTRICT d ON s.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE 
    s.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY 
    total_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmc.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) AS total_centers
FROM 
    DIM_STATE s
JOIN 
    DIM_DISTRICT d ON s.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE 
    s.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY 
    total_centers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool' மற்றும் 'South Andamans' ஆகிய மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களையும், அவற்றின் துணை மாவட்ட ஐடிகளின் (sub-district IDs) எண்ணிக்கையையும் பட்டியலிடவும். இவற்றை மாவட்டப் பெயரின் அடிப்படையில் குழுவாக்கி (grouped by), துணை மாவட்ட ஐடிகளின் எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் இறங்கு வரிசையில் (descending order) வரிசைப்படுத்தி, முதல் 5 முடிவுகளை மட்டும் காட்டவும்.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name, COUNT(s.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.district_name IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans')
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name, COUNT(s.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.district_name IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans')
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
